title: CloudDash Plan Comparison — Starter, Pro, Enterprise
content:
## CloudDash Plan Comparison

### Overview

| Feature | Starter | Pro | Enterprise |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Price** | $0/month | $79/month | Custom |
| **Seats** | 3 | 10 (+$15/extra) | Unlimited |
| **Cloud Integrations** | 1 | 5 | Unlimited |
| **Dashboards** | 5 | 50 | Unlimited |
| **Widgets per dashboard** | 10 | 50 | Unlimited |
| **Alert Rules** | 10 | 100 | Unlimited |
| **Data Retention** | 7 days | 90 days | 1 year+ |
| **API Keys** | 1 | 5 | Unlimited |
| **Webhook Channels** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **SSO (SAML/OIDC)** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **RBAC / Custom Roles** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Audit Logs** | ❌ | 30 days | Unlimited |
| **SLA** | None | 99.9% | 99.99% |
| **Support** | Email (3 days) | Email + Chat (8h) | Dedicated CSM (1h) |
| **Dashboard Caching** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **BM25 Hybrid Search** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Custom Branding** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **On-Prem Deployment** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |

### Starter Plan
Free forever. Best for individuals or small teams evaluating CloudDash. Limited to 1 cloud integration and 7-day metric history. No webhooks or SSO.

### Pro Plan — $79/month (billed monthly) or $67/month (billed annually, save 15%)
Best for growing engineering teams. Includes 5 cloud integrations, SSO, webhooks, 90-day retention, and live chat support.

### Enterprise Plan — Custom Pricing
For large organizations needing unlimited scale, RBAC, 1-year+ retention, custom SLAs, dedicated support, and optional on-premises deployment. Contact sales@clouddash.io.

### Annual Discount
All paid plans receive a **15% discount** when billed annually. Annual plans are invoiced upfront. Monthly plans can be upgraded to annual at any time — the remainder of the current billing cycle is prorated.

title: How to Upgrade or Downgrade Your Plan
content:
## How to Upgrade or Downgrade Your Plan

### Upgrading Your Plan

**From Starter to Pro**
1. Go to **Settings** → **Billing** → **Plans**.
2. Click **Upgrade to Pro**.
3. Enter payment details (credit card or request an invoice for annual plans).
4. Click **Confirm Upgrade**.
5. Access to Pro features is immediate. Your first charge will be prorated for the remainder of the current month.

**From Pro to Enterprise**
Enterprise requires a sales conversation as pricing is custom.
1. Click **Contact Sales** on the Plans page or email sales@clouddash.io.
2. A CloudDash Account Executive will reach out within 1 business day.

### Downgrading Your Plan

**From Pro to Starter**
1. Go to **Settings** → **Billing** → **Plans** → **Downgrade to Starter**.
2. Review the **impact summary** — it shows which resources exceed Starter limits (e.g. extra integrations, dashboards) and will be deactivated.
3. Confirm the downgrade.
- The downgrade takes effect at the **end of the current billing cycle** — you retain Pro access until then.
- Resources above Starter limits are not deleted; they are archived. If you upgrade again, they are restored.

### Proration Rules
- **Upgrades**: Charged immediately for the prorated difference for the current billing month.
- **Downgrades**: No refund for the current month; the lower rate applies from the next billing cycle.
- **Annual plans**: Downgrading mid-year does not trigger a refund. The remaining credit is applied to the new plan.

### What Happens to Data on Downgrade
- Metrics history beyond the new plan's retention limit becomes inaccessible (but is retained for 30 days in case you re-upgrade).
- Alert rules above the new plan's limit are paused, not deleted.
- Extra seats above the new plan's limit are deactivated.

title: Refund and Cancellation Policy
content:
## Refund and Cancellation Policy

### Monthly Plans
- Monthly subscriptions can be **cancelled at any time** from **Settings** → **Billing** → **Cancel Plan**.
- Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period — you retain access until then.
- **No refunds** are issued for the current month on monthly plans.

### Annual Plans
- Annual subscriptions can be cancelled at any time.
- If cancelled within **14 days of the annual renewal date**, a **full refund** of the annual payment is issued.
- If cancelled after 14 days, a **prorated refund** is issued for unused full months remaining.
- Example: Cancel in month 5 of a 12-month plan → receive a refund for months 6–12 (7 months), minus any setup or onboarding fees.

### Exceptions — No Refund Cases
- Charges for additional seats purchased mid-cycle are non-refundable.
- One-time professional services fees (onboarding, custom integrations) are non-refundable.
- Accounts terminated for Terms of Service violations are not eligible for refunds.

### Duplicate Charges
If you believe you were charged twice:
1. Go to **Settings** → **Billing** → **Invoice History** and check for duplicate entries.
2. If confirmed, submit a support ticket with the invoice numbers.
3. Duplicate charges are investigated within 2 business days and refunded to the original payment method within 5–10 business days if confirmed.

### Requesting a Refund
1. Submit a request via the **Help** → **Submit a Request** → **Billing** category.
2. Include your account ID, the invoice number, and the reason.
3. Refunds are processed within 5–10 business days to the original payment method.

### How to Cancel
1. **Settings** → **Billing** → **Plan** → **Cancel Plan**.
2. Select a cancellation reason (optional but appreciated).
3. Confirm cancellation. You will receive a confirmation email.

title: Understanding Your CloudDash Invoice
content:
## Understanding Your CloudDash Invoice

### Where to Find Invoices
- **Settings** → **Billing** → **Invoice History**
- Each invoice is downloadable as a PDF and also emailed to the billing email address on file.

### Invoice Line Items Explained

**Base Subscription**
Your monthly or annual plan charge. Example: `CloudDash Pro — Monthly: $79.00`

**Prorated Charges**
If you upgraded or added seats mid-cycle, you'll see a prorated charge for the remainder of that billing period. Example: `Pro Plan Proration (Apr 15–Apr 30): $39.50`

**Additional Seats**
If your team exceeded included seats, extra seats appear here. Example: `Additional Seats (2 × $15.00): $30.00`

**Taxes**
CloudDash collects sales tax or VAT where required by law. Your tax amount and rate are shown separately. If your organization is tax-exempt, upload your exemption certificate via **Settings** → **Billing** → **Tax Exemption**.

**Credits Applied**
If you have account credits (from referrals, SLA credits, or promotional codes), they appear as a negative line item before the total.

### Common Questions

**Why is this month's invoice higher than usual?**
Check for: new seats added, a plan upgrade mid-month (proration), annual renewal, or a new region added to an integration.

**I don't recognize a charge.**
Check the invoice date — if you recently renewed an annual plan, the full annual amount appears in one charge. If still unrecognized, contact support with the invoice number.

**Can I change the billing email?**
Yes: **Settings** → **Billing** → **Billing Contact** → update the email.

**Can I pay by invoice / bank transfer?**
Yes, for annual Pro or Enterprise plans. Contact billing@clouddash.io to request ACH or wire transfer payment options.

title: Payment Methods and Billing Cycle
content:
## Payment Methods and Billing Cycle

### Accepted Payment Methods
- **Credit / Debit Cards**: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover (processed via Stripe)
- **ACH / Bank Transfer**: Available for annual Pro and Enterprise plans (contact billing@clouddash.io)
- **Wire Transfer**: Enterprise plans only
- **Purchase Orders**: Enterprise plans only — contact sales@clouddash.io

### Updating Your Payment Method
1. Go to **Settings** → **Billing** → **Payment Method**.
2. Click **Update Card**.
3. Enter new card details. The new card becomes active immediately.
4. The old card is removed once a successful charge has been processed on the new card.

### Billing Cycle
- **Monthly plans**: Charged on the same day each month (your signup date). Example: Signed up April 7 → charged every 7th of the month.
- **Annual plans**: Charged once per year on the renewal date.

### Failed Payments
If a payment fails:
1. CloudDash retries the charge after **3 days**, then again after **7 days**.
2. You receive an email notification after each failed attempt.
3. If the payment is not resolved within **14 days**, your account is downgraded to Starter (your data is preserved for 30 days).
4. To resolve: **Settings** → **Billing** → **Payment Method** → update your card → **Retry Payment**.

### Currency
All charges are in **USD**. International cards are accepted; your card issuer handles currency conversion.
